# IMPLEMENTATION - STEP 7: VERIFY ROUTE TREE
**Status:** completed

## Summary
Triggered TanStack Router Vite plugin codegen via `npx vite build`, verified `routeTree.gen.ts` contains all 6 routes, fixed unused variable TS error in `index.tsx`, confirmed `npm run type-check` and `npm run build` both pass cleanly.

## Changes
### File: `llm_pipeline/ui/frontend/src/routes/index.tsx`

```
# Before

  const search = Route.useSearch()

  return (

# After

```

### File: `llm_pipeline/ui/frontend/src/routeTree.gen.ts` (auto-generated)
Regenerated by TanStack Router Vite plugin. Now includes all routes:
- `__root__` (root layout)
- `/` (IndexRoute)
- `/live` (LiveRoute)
- `/pipelines` (PipelinesRoute)
- `/prompts` (PromptsRoute)
- `/runs/$runId` (RunsRunIdRoute)

autoCodeSplitting produced separate chunks: `index`, `live`, `pipelines`, `prompts`, `_runId`.

## Decisions
### Remove unused search variable vs suppress lint
**Choice:** Remove `const search = Route.useSearch()` entirely
**Rationale:** `noUnusedLocals: true` in tsconfig.app.json rejects unused locals even with underscore prefix. The call is a placeholder for task 31; removing it is cleaner than disabling the lint rule. Task 31 will re-add when wiring API hooks.

## Verification
[x] `npx vite build` triggered routeTree.gen.ts regeneration
[x] routeTree.gen.ts contains all 6 routes: `/`, `/live`, `/pipelines`, `/prompts`, `/runs/$runId`, `__root__`
[x] `npm run type-check` passes with zero errors
[x] `npm run build` (tsc + vite) passes with zero errors
[x] autoCodeSplitting produces separate chunks per route
